reasoning: Content B includes an explicit, specific, and well-sourced figure from Wikipedia: 'Its radioisotope thermoelectric generators (RTGs) may supply enough electric power to return engineering data until 2036,' which directly answers the question with a concrete year from a generally reliable reference source.
